execution_state.step_name: Grid Hardening and Modal Data Upgrade

completed_steps.step_name: Global Service DB Audit & Syntax Repair
insights: Extra div tags in the grid hierarchy caused visual jumping on refresh.
Missing modal data in ServiceDB led to inactive service cards.
RTL dropdown positioning requires 'right-0' anchoring to avoid heading overlap.

critical_rules: ALWAYS maintain the 8-card grid structure in index.html.
NEVER leave dangling div tags in the services section.
Maintain the Tejal font and Gold/Teal theme strictly.
